posts.text:
朝の光に包まれた、透明感あふれるAI美女。柔らかな陽射しが頬を照らす瞬間を切り取りました。

#AI美女 #AIイラスト

image_prompt.prompt: Photorealistic AI-generated portrait of a beautiful Japanese woman bathed in soft golden morning light, translucent skin, delicate features, gentle bokeh background of cherry blossom petals, warm sunlight casting soft shadows across her cheekbones, cinematic lighting, 8k ultra-detailed, shot on Canon EOS R5
image_prompt.negative_prompt: cartoonish, low quality, blurry, distorted features, oversaturated
image_prompt.style_reference: Japanese beauty photography, natural light portraiture

posts.notes: Variant A: 2 hashtags (always_use + 1 rotate). Morning slot targets commuter browsing. Portrait category leverages soft natural lighting aesthetic popular in JP market.

posts.text:
東京ストリートを歩くAI美女。春の風を感じるコーデ、今日のインスピレーションにどうぞ。

#AI美女 #AIart #digitalart #SFW

image_prompt.prompt: Photorealistic full-body shot of a stylish AI-generated Japanese woman walking on a trendy Tokyo street, wearing a modern spring outfit with layered pastel tones, flowing midi skirt and oversized blazer, street fashion photography style, warm afternoon light, urban background with blurred neon signs, editorial fashion quality, 8k
image_prompt.negative_prompt: NSFW, revealing clothing, low quality, anime style, distorted proportions
image_prompt.style_reference: Tokyo street fashion editorial, Japanese Vogue aesthetic

posts.notes: Variant B: 4 hashtags (always_use + 2 rotate + 1 niche). Lunch break slot. Fashion category weight increased to 25% per strategy — testing differentiation from dominant anime style in JP market.

posts.text:
幻想的な夜の世界。光と影が織りなすAIアートの新たな表現に挑戦しました。

#AI美女 #AIイラスト

image_prompt.prompt: Ethereal AI-generated artwork of a beautiful woman surrounded by luminous floating lanterns in a dreamlike night scene, semi-realistic art style blending illustration and photography, deep indigo and gold color palette, intricate lighting effects with volumetric fog, celestial atmosphere, fantasy fine art quality, 8k
image_prompt.negative_prompt: overly cartoonish, chibi, low resolution, harsh lighting, cluttered composition
image_prompt.style_reference: Japanese fantasy art, Makoto Shinkai-inspired atmospheric lighting, modern digital art

posts.notes: Variant A: 2 hashtags (always_use + 1 rotate). Evening prime time slot. Artistic category at 25% weight — bridges gap between photorealistic and illustration styles popular in JP market.

posts.text:
春がもうすぐそこに。桜の季節に合わせた特別なAIビューティー作品をお届けします。皆さんの好きな春のモチーフは何ですか？

#AI美女 #AIart #digitalart #SFW

image_prompt.prompt: Stunning AI-generated beauty portrait with cherry blossom theme, beautiful woman with flowers in her hair, surrounded by falling sakura petals, soft pink and white color palette, dreamy spring atmosphere, macro-detail on petals, gentle wind effect, Japanese spring aesthetic, high fashion meets nature, 8k ultra-detailed
image_prompt.negative_prompt: winter theme, dark colors, low quality, distorted face, unrealistic anatomy
image_prompt.style_reference: Japanese spring photography, sakura season editorials, hanami aesthetic

posts.notes: Variant B: 4 hashtags (always_use + 2 rotate + 1 niche). Late night slot for relaxed browsing. Trend reactive — tapping into early sakura season buzz ahead of peak cherry blossom period in late March.

reply_templates: 素敵な作品ですね！光の使い方がとても印象的です✨
この色合い、本当に美しいです。どんなプロンプトで作られたんですか？
構図が素晴らしいですね。背景の雰囲気も完璧です！
いつも高品質な作品をありがとうございます。今回も見入ってしまいました
このスタイル大好きです！リアルさと幻想的な雰囲気のバランスが絶妙ですね
細部までこだわりが感じられる作品ですね。特に目元の表現が美しいです
雰囲気がとても素敵です。こういう世界観にいつも惹かれます
クオリティが高すぎます！制作過程もぜひ見てみたいです
